What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Female athletes wearing white sports tops and black bottoms stand on a blue indoor track with white lane lines. Some athletes place hands on hips while others clap near white starting blocks numbered 1 through 7. Background banners display ORLEN and TORUŃ 2023 logos above rows of empty blue stadium seating. Graphic overlays indicate the event is the 60m hurdles women's pentathlon.

question: Describe the sequence of actions performed by the athletes from the beginning of the clip until the race starts.
canonical_answer: At 0s, athletes are seen clapping hands while standing on the track; at 4s, two athletes stand side-by-side with hands placed on their hips; at 6s, one athlete starts waving hands near her face; at 14s, athletes bend forward to touch white starting blocks; at 18s, the group launches into a sprint from the starting line.

question: What specific postural changes occur among the athletes at the starting line before the race begins?
canonical_answer: At 12s, athletes are preparing at white starting blocks numbered three through six; at 14s, an athlete in lane five raises hands to face while others adjust posture; at 16s, five athletes stand behind blocks in lanes two through six; at 18s, the group transitions from a static preparatory stance to dynamic forward motion; at 20s, they sprint down the blue indoor track.
